justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including 'tomorrow already at 8', 'around 9 AM tomorrow, June 2nd', and 'Wednesday, June 3rd, in the morning'.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative times when the initial request was unavailable, offering a few options for the user to choose from.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation, avoiding unnecessary turns and only asking for information not already provided.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone and successfully booking the appointment without any issues.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully after the initial unavailability, maintaining full context and intelligently expanding the search for new appointment slots.
